message:
feat(pool): complete Cx-first suite — 4 more _with_cx entry points (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Completes the Pool Cx-first coverage started in tick 13 (timeout fix)
and tick 15 (idle-mutex fix). All six public async Pool methods now
have explicit `_with_cx` variants so callers threading `&Cx` through
their API can propagate cancellation into every idle-pool mutex
acquire.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/pool.rs (+77 src, +47 tests)

   New Cx-first public entry points (all asupersync-runtime gated):

     * `put_with_cx(cx, conn)` — return a connection under explicit Cx
     * `evict_idle_with_cx(cx)` — evict expired idle under explicit Cx
     * `stats_with_cx(cx)` — read stats under explicit Cx
     * `clear_with_cx(cx)` — drain the idle queue under explicit Cx

   Each uses `self.idle.lock_with_cx(cx).await` (the primitive from
   tick 9) instead of `self.idle.lock().await`, so a caller-cancelled
   wait propagates through the mutex wait directly rather than being
   pulled from `Cx::current()` thread-local state.

   Legacy methods under `asupersync-runtime` delegate to the
   `_with_cx` variants via `cx::for_request()`. Non-asupersync
   fallback preserves the inline `.lock()` pattern.

2. One new test:

   * `pool_non_acquire_methods_with_cx_full_roundtrip`: end-to-end
     exercise of put_with_cx → stats_with_cx → evict_idle_with_cx →
     clear_with_cx on a single Pool instance. Asserts the observable
     state transitions (idle_count: 0→1→1→0, total_returned: 1,
     total_evicted >= 1). Pins no-regression on all four new
     Cx-first methods.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib pool::: 180/180 pass
    (179 existing + 1 new Cx-first)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Pool suite is now fully Cx-first: acquire + try_acquire + put +
evict_idle + stats + clear. Caller `&Cx` flows through every
semaphore/timeout/mutex boundary. Fifth multi-method surface to
reach full Cx-first parity (after CautClient, ProtocolRecoveryEngine,
CassClient, RecordingManager).

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
